q: What was the name of the 2015 documentary about Ronaldo's life directed by Anthony Wonke?
Ronaldo acquired a 25% ownership stake in which Spanish football club in February 2026?
What ban did FIFA issue Ronaldo after he was sent off for elbowing Dara O'Shea in November 2025?
a: A three-match ban and one year of probation

q: Where did Ronaldo meet Georgina Rodríguez for the first time?
a: At a Gucci store in Madrid in 2016

q: Ronaldo holds the all-time record for most penalties scored in football history. How many has he converted?
a: 180 penalties — the most in football history
